audio_and_caption_sources.caption_text_policy: Visible rail captions and YouTube sidecars must be generated from the locked script text. ASR, SRT, VTT, and WhisperX artifacts may supply timing only.

story_time_model.music_contract_retime_note: A later music integration contract may add an intro voice-start offset; proof times and caption sidecars must be retimed there before rough assembly.

rail_text_model.active_panel: major chapter label, semantic active title, one short summary
rail_text_model.context_rows: nearby previous/upcoming semantic chapter titles only

rail_palette_intent.source_aware_palette: deep blue-gray rain glass and wet ramp shadow, warm amber practical lights, muted cream caption text
rail_palette_intent.readability_strategy: localized active-panel fill and caption softener only; no broad full-frame dark veil and no full-height opaque right-column panel

chapters.title: Two Crews, One Hidden System
chapters.rail_summary: Two departures reveal one hidden control path.
chapters.story_anchor: Lion Air 610, Ethiopian 302, and the premise that this is not about one faulty sensor.
chapters.visual_behavior: Start on the kept terminal/ramp plate with settled rail state; terminal silhouettes and ramp lights imply public attention before departure.

chapters.title: A Familiar Airplane Had Changed
chapters.rail_summary: A familiar airframe changed around a larger engine.
chapters.story_anchor: 737 commonality, A320neo pressure, MAX modernization, and the forward/high engine relationship.
chapters.visual_behavior: Rail emphasis shifts toward nose and engine geometry; source plate remains intact with no overlays or labels on the aircraft.

chapters.title: Software Preserved the Promise
chapters.rail_summary: Software made a new physical behavior feel old.
chapters.story_anchor: MCAS introduced to compensate for changed pitch behavior, then expanded during development.
chapters.visual_behavior: Right-rail transitions carry the software idea; the source plate gets only transform/opacity behavior, not diagnostic marks.

chapters.title: One Sensor Became Enough
chapters.rail_summary: One input gained enough authority to move the airplane.
chapters.story_anchor: Single AOA dependency, undisclosed MCAS, Lion Air, Ethiopian, and the first framing around procedure.
chapters.visual_behavior: Rail contrast tightens around the single-sensor claim; no cyan traces, connector lines, cockpit UI, or sensor graphics appear over the plate.

chapters.title: Training Followed Commonality
chapters.rail_summary: The commonality promise shaped what pilots were told.
chapters.story_anchor: Five conditions: competitive pressure, MCAS authority growth, single-sensor acceptance, and limited pilot knowledge.
chapters.visual_behavior: Semantic rail chapter changes carry the condition sequence without ordinal-only labels or out-of-rail cards.

chapters.title: Procedure Hid Architecture
chapters.rail_summary: A procedure answer avoided an architecture problem.
chapters.story_anchor: The fifth condition, post-Lion Air response, congressional record, oversight failures, and return-to-service redesign.
chapters.visual_behavior: Rail copy and subtle plate quieting distinguish procedure from architecture; no hearing-room paperwork carrier is introduced.

chapters.title: The Familiar Story Failed
chapters.rail_summary: The familiar-airplane story collapsed into a system failure.
chapters.story_anchor: System synthesis, familiar-aircraft claim, cause-chain close, and canonical next-episode line.
chapters.visual_behavior: Motion and rail energy calm down for synthesis; captions and story rail text must suppress before the eventual end-screen window.

typography_cues.treatment: brief right-rail active-title weight emphasis only
active summary shift toward physical-change thesis
semantic title transition into software promise
active panel contrast lift and chapter transition
short rail pause with caption held cleanly in native rail slot

typography_cues.trigger: procedure before it was admitted as architecture
typography_cues.treatment: semantic chapter transition, no ordinal labels
rail summary snaps from event chronology into mechanism synthesis
settled closing rail with subdued source-art motion

effect_map_cues.story_function: Make the larger forward/high engine relationship the visual root of the cascade.
effect_map_cues.treatment: source-safe crop/scale emphasis toward aircraft nose and engine; no lines, labels, arrows, or diagram overlays

effect_map_cues.story_function: Shift from physical change to hidden stabilizer correction path.
effect_map_cues.treatment: right-rail state change and restrained source-plate dimming; no cockpit UI or MCAS graphic

effect_map_cues.story_function: Emphasize that one input carried aircraft-moving authority.
effect_map_cues.treatment: rail emphasis and caption pacing; no generated sensor marker or cyan trace

effect_map_cues.story_function: Separate procedural response from design architecture.
effect_map_cues.treatment: semantic rail transition and context-row reordering; no evidence-table or hearing-room insert

effect_map_cues.story_function: Close on the chain rather than individual villains.
effect_map_cues.treatment: decelerating rail transitions and lower-motion source-art behavior before end-screen suppression

allowed: very slow source-plate push of less than 2 percent
caption slot softener only while captions are present
source-integrated ramp-light and rain-glass motion planned later in ambient/effects layer
blocked: cyan route lines or sensor traces
generated text outside the right rail

next_action: Human review must choose keep, tighten, or reject for the Candidate L Living Cover cue map. Only cue-map keep can open ambient/effects planning.
